body.title: skill model routing: haiku for mechanical commands, sonnet for reasoning
body.result: Implemented: model: haiku frontmatter on filter/audit/slateclose/readigor/slate/fixit; CLAUDE.md routing table + Agent(model=haiku) convention added. D267 recorded.
body.description: Add model: haiku frontmatter to filter/audit/fixit/slateclose/readigor skills; add routing convention to CLAUDE.md so Agent(model=haiku) is spawned for those skills. Saves ~$80/day on mechanical task overhead.
